verdict.answer_first: Tie: both lead with the method immediately; A: "custom hook that debounces the value", B: "small useDebounce hook".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleaner to one path: "for a single input the hook above"; A diffuses into options: "AbortController", "@mantine/hooks", "use-debounce".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it gives one hook, one usage, one dependency rule; A adds extra branches after the answer.
